name: seo-autopilot
description: Self-driving, data-driven SEO for AI coding agents. Pulls real Google Search Console data, implements Google-recommended fixes in a safe branch, verifies the rendered output (static HTML + live DOM) with Chrome DevTools, and ships — on loop. Works with any agent that reads AGENTS.md or Agent Skills (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Windsurf, Aider, Zed, and more).
